title: サイレンススズカ登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To prepare for her debut race, Silence Suzuka
partakes in scrimmages at the academy, where
she astounds onlookers with her runaway style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she remains unmoved by the attention,
and is only focused on seeing the scenery from
the lead of a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Here begins the story of Silence Suzuka, a racer
who loves running more than anyone, as she seeks
to break the limits of speed itself.
